prose:
**Formaldehyde frontier-orbital result** — Property: HOMO–LUMO gap from a DFT frontier-orbitals single point. Method used: DFT tier `standard`, explicitly `b3lyp/def2-tzvp` in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: fixed user-supplied XYZ at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz` (4 atoms); no geometry optimization was performed in this task. Density fitting was not enabled. SCF converged: true, in 8 cycles. Engine integrity trustworthy verdict: true.

Headline result: HOMO–LUMO gap = **5.8696712 eV**.

Additional orbital energies: HOMO = -7.6523067 eV; LUMO = -1.7826355 eV. Total electronic energy = -114.55325 hartree = -3117.1528 eV.

Warnings: no warnings reported.

Reproducibility: chemkit CLI invocation returned by the tool was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/formaldehyde/formaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplh40sph2/live.json`. The tool result did not expose a live `.out` log path; the returned output JSON path in the invocation was `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmplh40sph2/live.json`.
